_comment: Main storyline quests (Task 2). One quest per region plus a capstone. Loaded by engine/quest_loader.py; DEVMON_HOME/quests.json entries merge in by quest_id (override/extend). Narrative tone drawn from data/regions.json's region descriptions (docs/STORY.md, once it lands, is the fuller tone reference for future additions). objectives is a list to support future multi-objective quests (e.g. dungeon gauntlets, see docs/ROADMAP-DEPTH.md).

narrative.offer: The compiler hums, waiting for its first real test. Prove your build works -- defeat three wild DevMon in Termina Meadows.
narrative.complete: First compile clean. Termina Meadows opens fully to you now.

narrative.offer: The toolchain is rusted through and the build servers won't stop overheating. Win five battles in the Compiler Wastes and clear the warnings before they become errors.
narrative.complete: Every warning silenced. The Wastes' scorched build flags cool at last.

narrative.offer: The availability zones are drifting again and the SREs need proof your uptime holds. Capture two DevMon to show the redundancy works.
narrative.complete: Five nines held. The Cloud Reaches trust your failover now.

narrative.offer: Below the OS itself, the substrate is dark and the syscalls are raw. Win eight battles in the Kernel Depths to prove you belong this deep.
narrative.complete: The Depths go quiet around you. You've earned ring zero.

narrative.offer: Packet undeliverable. There is no man page for what lives past the edge of the routing table -- travel to the Voidnet and see for yourself.
narrative.complete: You've arrived where the routing table ends. Something legendary is watching.

narrative.offer: You've bonded with something the routing table has no entry for. Ten battles in the Voidnet stand between you and understanding what it means.
narrative.complete: There is no man page for this either. But you wrote one anyway.
